result.reason: New or reconnected tabs are currently always appended to the end of the tab strip due to the default behavior of the underlying DockPanelSuite library, which negatively impacts user experience.
result.approach: Investigate DockPanelSuite's API for inserting DockContent (ConnectionTab) at a specific index. Modify the AddConnectionTab method in ConnectionWindow.cs to utilize this API to place new tabs next to the currently active tab or another logical position. For reconnected tabs, attempt to store and restore their original position within the tab strip.
